S.FORM: Cisanmaw I "pabelian naku kisu tu cacay a subayu" ku kamu. : "yadah tu kunicudadan, masumad ku bihid, " , alahican sa,Ť®ĪŚ§öśôāŚÄô, u udip akay yadah tu ku nadihan tu cudad mala caliway sa nanay i mata mahida u ladem nu wacah, inayay matateng , nika mahidaay tu u idaway . . iwayway, ikamu sa,Śú®śį£Ť≥™ťáĆ,Śú®ŤęáŚźźšłä, inayay ku dihab nu baluwang,Śú®ŤÉłŤ•üÁöĄÁĄ°ś∂Į, mihida tu maadihay i nikaudip atu idulit. ." u nicudadan isu, ninanaman a kakatinengan, , sadikuday sa malainayayay,śúÄŚĺĆťÉĹśėĮÁĄ°ŚĹĘÁöĄ, mucumd i ndatebgan mahida idaway tu,śúÉŤěćŚÖ•šĹ†ÁöĄśĹõśĄŹŤ≠ė, malawayway nu msu, malaucizu. . amana kasaetim miliwku,ść®ŚĺóŚéĽśóÖŤ°Ć namipalita tu kaku ci naan aku,śõĺÁ∂ďŚēŹťĀéśąĎŚ™Ĺ: mahica nanu nikatinengan aku tu kawaw malngatu,ÁāļšĽÄťļľŚĺěśąĎŤ®ėšļčťĖčŚßč, isu sa caay henay piliyas tu luma' . mapaaw cinaakuśąĎŚ™ĹšłÄśÄĒ, matenes tu caay henay pidateng tu mahiniay a kawaw, . alahcan makaadih tu cabay,Ś•ĻŚĀ∂ÁąĺÁúčŚąįśúčŚŹčŚúąŤ£°, lalumaan tu cabay namidangay a sasing, , mainal tu musakamu,šĻüśúÉÁĺ®śÖēšłÄŚÖ©ŚŹ•, sakamusa"yah ,hatinitu kumhca aku , cimatu ku mamisahemay tina katuuday, naycuwaay a lawad a mdang." ." imahda, dateng sa cakaku ,ťā£śôāŚÄô,śąĎÁ™ĀÁĄ∂śĄŹŤ≠ėŚąį, tatenga caay kalpahak ku nikaudip nina aku. . kiyu, misaicelang kaku ametan tu kalisiw, , mkizay tu tuki, amuladay tu wina wama tahekal amidang, , sakamun aku, uduma akawaw,ŚĎäŤ®īŚ•Ļ,śúČšļõšļčśÉÖ, kapah paydang han , saycan tu ku nipaayaw , . sakamu sa ci Iykungcung i "cay katineng" acuda nisulitan mahini kidakamu, : "anu mdang masumad ku wayway nu tademaw,"śóÖŤ°ĆśúÉśĒĻŤģäšļļÁöĄśį£Ť≥™, pakaadih tu masumad micunus paka tanayu', . telung nipidangan ,Śú®śóÖťÄĒšł≠, maadih isu ku cayay kalecad a tademaw, cayay kalecad ku nikaudip , kya matineng tu kisu,šĹ†śČćŤÉĹšļÜŤß£Śąį, caay namin kalecad tu tademaw mududuc tu kamu isu amaudip, . mahnisa, u balucu' nu tademaw masumad ahebal tu, ." hang śėĮŚēä, nikaudip tu pakaluwaluway mahicaay tu hakiya kita uctademaw caay kalpahak., , alahican minanam kita misawalesay tu nikanelu', , amana pakay balucu'i ku cayay kalipahak atu sademiad amulingaling, pikilimi tu sulit atutabatad, , kiya ahebal tu ku balucu',ŤģďŚÖßŚŅÉŚĮ¨śēěŤĶ∑šĺÜ. sikulen ku aniwiyu nu bslucu'ŚģąŚĺóšĹŹŚÖßŚŅÉŚĮßťĚú u kacudu"mukilul tu bli mahida u lalin"sananay idaw kidakamu: : saka senengan ku wayway, yu musakamu anu adidi' ku ngiha, u sakakawaw sa tabaki. " ."ina kamu pasubana titaan ,ťÄôŚŹ•Ť©ĪŚĎäŤ®īśąĎŚÄĎ, u duma a kawaw amana palatikih nayi ku hica,śúČšļõšļčśÉÖšłćŚÄľŚĺóŤ®ąŤľÉ, u duma atademaw amana pikakutud,śúČšļõšļļšłćŚÄľŚĺóÁ≥ĺÁļŹ, u nayay ku balucu' a tademaw ,šłćŚíĆŤ¨õÁźÜÁöĄšļļ, sasahican amasasukaynah,ś≤íŚŅÖŤ¶ĀŚíĆšĽĖŚÄĎÁą≠Śü∑, supeden ku i balucuay a sadep, , kiyu u tatengaay a tabakiay a nabalucuan.śČćśėĮÁúüś≠£ÁöĄŚ§ßśį£. anu sikawaw amana kaalialiyac. . yadahay a kawaw ŚĺąŚ§öšļčśÉÖ, anu matibeng tu kita paculi inayi tu ku laheci, , anu mahini sa pinabaw han tu kubalucu',šłćŚ¶āŤģďŚÖßŚŅÉÁöĄśĻĖťĚĘ, satedepen ku nikasalain.ŚĀúś≠Ęś≥õśľ£śľ™. sakamu sa ci:wang-cen-ciśĪ™śõĺÁ•ļŤ™™: "satedep, u nikaniketan, widasa,u nananaman""ťĚú, . sakamusa ci:cu-ke-liyang: "caay kaw pahelak sananay caay kaw matatudungay, anu caay kasatedep nayi ku laheci tabaat" ." minabaw ku balucu' cay kaw matatudungay. usadep unananaman tu" ." amana kalalid nu hekal palamal han malikat tu, amana katengteng nu cayay katatudung atademaw, anu caay kalewasay , kasadep ku balucu' , yaan naca tepalay a tademaw manamuh tu, widasa namakay nilabunu balucu' a nikaniketan. . katuud kunamicudaday mipalita: pahabay kaku takuwansa, maniket, sadikuday sa taluma' tu, sadikuday balakisatu tanukubid sa tu. . ci yang-lan sakamusa tu cacay , kapah ku nipatukil nida: "idaw ku palitaay, utatayna matenes micuda, yadah kunipicuda, sadikuday sa taluma'iniyadu', , mikuli, siacawaw mibaca, malalungun tu acawaw mukelid tu wawaw, sakangeluansa? ? dateng sa kaku, hatiniay tu numita amuledu usakahica, kanahatu dadikuday madebay ikacalilaw, caytu pakaduduc, malecaday a kawaw, caykalecad ku balucu', śąĎśÉ≥, , Malecaday a lauma' , cay kalecad ku labunuluma' malecaday u mukilulay, cay kalecad ku azi. Nikaudip kanca idaw ku cangbul, nika bihbihen ku ababuh nu dikuc, tatayna, anu icuwacuwa kisu, mitanam tu canan a kawaw, sadikuday sa lawpes sa I mihmihcaan,u kakawaw namusa caay kaw sapibelin tu mihcaan a nikaydaan. Widasa saicelang sa musikul tu wayway nu udip, paledu tu kapah, caypilunguc tu belabelad sananay, sisa leduhan manamuh maudip. . sakapah han malaudip, yumidadingu kisu sa, umaminay nu misu awayway sa, masinga naming i labu nu dadingu ya tusaay a mata. . liwan nu kaudip, maydih kaku lipahak tu kisu, manakatawal tu sayaway a balucu' nu tatayna, yadahen ku lipahak, yadahen ku satumicek.ť§ėÁĒü, .
S.PHON: ¶isanmaw i "pab…ôr~…ĺian naku kisu tu ¶a ¶aj a subaju" ku kamu. : "jadańß tu kuni ¶udadan, masumad ku bińßid, " , ar~…ĺańßi ¶an sa,****, u udip akaj jadańß tu ku nadińßan tu ¶udad mar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺiwaj sa nanaj i mata mańßida u r~…ĺad…ôm nu wa ¶ańß, inajaj matat…ôŇč , nika mańßidaaj tu u idawaj . . iwajwaj, ikamu sa,****,****, inajaj ku dińßab nu bar~…ĺuwaŇč,******, mińßida tu maadińßaj i nikaudip atu idur~…ĺit. ." u ni ¶udadan isu, ninanaman a kakatin…ôŇčan, , sadikudaj sa mar~…ĺainajajaj,*******, mu ¶umd i ndat…ôbgan mańßida idawaj tu,********, mar~…ĺawajwaj nu msu, mar~…ĺau ¶izu. . amana kasa…ôtim mir~…ĺiwku,***** namipar~…ĺita tu kaku ¶i naan aku,******: mańßi ¶a nanu nikatin…ôŇčan aku tu kawaw mar~…ĺŇčatu,*********, isu sa ¶aaj ńß…ônaj pir~…ĺijas tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° . mapaaw ¶inaaku****, mat…ôn…ôs tu ¶aaj ńß…ônaj pidat…ôŇč tu mańßiniaj a kawaw, . ar~…ĺańß ¶an makaadińß tu ¶abaj,*********, r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan tu ¶abaj namidaŇčaj a sasiŇč, , mainar~…ĺ tu musakamu,*******, sakamusa"jańß ,ńßatinitu kumńß ¶a aku , ¶imatu ku mamisańß…ômaj tina katuudaj, naj ¶uwaaj a r~…ĺawad a mdaŇč." ." imańßda, dat…ôŇč sa ¶akaku ,***,******, tat…ôŇča ¶aaj kar~…ĺpańßak ku nikaudip nina aku. . kiju, misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč kaku am…ôtan tu kar~…ĺisiw, , mkizaj tu tuki, amur~…ĺadaj tu wina wama tańß…ôkar~…ĺ amidaŇč, , sakamun aku, uduma akawaw,***,****, kapańß pajdaŇč ńßan , saj ¶an tu ku nipaajaw , . sakamu sa ¶i ijkuŇč ¶uŇč i " ¶aj katin…ôŇč" a ¶uda nisur~…ĺitan mańßini kidakamu, : "anu mdaŇč masumad ku wajwaj nu tad…ômaw,"*********, pakaadińß tu masumad mi ¶unus paka tanaju Ē~ °, . t…ôr~…ĺuŇč nipidaŇčan ,****, maadińß isu ku ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a tad…ômaw, ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku nikaudip , kja matin…ôŇč tu kisu,******, ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu tad…ômaw mududu ¶ tu kamu isu amaudip, . mańßnisa, u bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu tad…ômaw masumad ańß…ôbar~…ĺ tu, ." ńßaŇč **, nikaudip tu pakar~…ĺuwar~…ĺuwaj mańßi ¶aaj tu ńßakija kita u ¶tad…ômaw ¶aaj kar~…ĺpańßak., , ar~…ĺańßi ¶an minanam kita misawar~…ĺ…ôsaj tu nikan…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °, , amana pakaj bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °i ku ¶ajaj kar~…ĺipańßak atu sad…ômiad amur~…ĺiŇčar~…ĺiŇč, pikir~…ĺimi tu sur~…ĺit atutabatad, , kija ańß…ôbar~…ĺ tu ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °,*******. sikur~…ĺ…ôn ku aniwiju nu bsr~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °******* u ka ¶udu"mukir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu br~…ĺi mańßida u r~…ĺar~…ĺin"sananaj idaw kidakamu: : saka s…ôn…ôŇčan ku wajwaj, ju musakamu anu adidi Ē~ ° ku Ňčińßa, u sakakawaw sa tabaki. " ."ina kamu pasubana titaan ,*******, u duma a kawaw amana par~…ĺatikińß naji ku ńßi ¶a,*********, u duma atad…ômaw amana pikakutud,********, u najaj ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a tad…ômaw ,******, sasańßi ¶an amasasukajnańß,********, sup…ôd…ôn ku i bar~…ĺu ¶uaj a sad…ôp, , kiju u tat…ôŇčaaj a tabakiaj a nabar~…ĺu ¶uan.*******. anu sikawaw amana kaar~…ĺiar~…ĺija ¶. . jadańßaj a kawaw ****, anu matib…ôŇč tu kita pa ¶ur~…ĺi inaji tu ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i, , anu mańßini sa pinabaw ńßan tu kubar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °,********, sat…ôd…ôp…ôn ku nikasar~…ĺain.*****. sakamu sa ¶i:waŇč- ¶…ôn- ¶i****: "sat…ôd…ôp, u nikanik…ôtan, widasa,u nananaman""*, . sakamusa ¶i: ¶u-k…ô-r~…ĺijaŇč: " ¶aaj kaw pańß…ôr~…ĺak sananaj ¶aaj kaw matatuduŇčaj, anu ¶aaj kasat…ôd…ôp naji ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tabaat" ." minabaw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ¶aj kaw matatuduŇčaj. usad…ôp unananaman tu" ." amana kar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ par~…ĺamar~…ĺ ńßan mar~…ĺikat tu, amana kat…ôŇčt…ôŇč nu ¶ajaj katatuduŇč atad…ômaw, anu ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ôwasaj , kasad…ôp ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° , jaan na ¶a t…ôpar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw manamuńß tu, widasa namakaj nir~…ĺabunu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a nikanik…ôtan. . katuud kunami ¶udadaj mipar~…ĺita: pańßabaj kaku takuwansa, manik…ôt, sadikudaj sa tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu, sadikudaj bar~…ĺakisatu tanukubid sa tu. . ¶i jaŇč-r~…ĺan sakamusa tu ¶a ¶aj , kapańß ku nipatukir~…ĺ nida: "idaw ku par~…ĺitaaj, utatajna mat…ôn…ôs mi ¶uda, jadańß kunipi ¶uda, sadikudaj sa tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °inijadu Ē~ °, , mikur~…ĺi, sia ¶awaw miba ¶a, mar~…ĺar~…ĺuŇčun tu a ¶awaw muk…ôr~…ĺid tu wawaw, sakaŇč…ôr~…ĺuansa? ? dat…ôŇč sa kaku, ńßatiniaj tu numita amur~…ĺ…ôdu usakańßi ¶a, kanańßatu dadikudaj mad…ôbaj ika ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw, ¶ajtu pakadudu ¶, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a kawaw, ¶ajkar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, **, , mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺauma Ē~ ° , ¶aj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku r~…ĺabunur~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj u mukir~…ĺur~…ĺaj, ¶aj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku azi. nikaudip kan ¶a idaw ku ¶aŇčbur~…ĺ, nika bińßbińß…ôn ku ababuńß nu diku ¶, tatajna, anu i ¶uwa ¶uwa kisu, mitanam tu ¶anan a kawaw, sadikudaj sa r~…ĺawp…ôs sa i mińßmińß ¶aan,u kakawaw namusa ¶aaj kaw sapib…ôr~…ĺin tu mińß ¶aan a nikajdaan. widasa sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa musikur~…ĺ tu wajwaj nu udip, par~…ĺ…ôdu tu kapańß, ¶ajpir~…ĺuŇču ¶ tu b…ôr~…ĺab…ôr~…ĺad sananaj, sisa r~…ĺ…ôduńßan manamuńß maudip. . sakapańß ńßan mar~…ĺaudip, jumidadiŇču kisu sa, umaminaj nu misu awajwaj sa, masiŇča namiŇč i r~…ĺabu nu dadiŇču ja tusaaj a mata. . r~…ĺiwan nu kaudip, majdińß kaku r~…ĺipańßak tu kisu, manakatawar~…ĺ tu sajawaj a bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu tatajna, jadańß…ôn ku r~…ĺipańßak, jadańß…ôn ku satumi ¶…ôk.**, .

" ."ina kamu pasubana titaan ,ťÄôŚŹ•Ť©ĪŚĎäŤ®īśąĎŚÄĎ, u duma a kawaw amana palatikih nayi ku hica,śúČšļõšļčśÉÖšłćŚÄľŚĺóŤ®ąŤľÉ, u duma atademaw amana pikakutud,śúČšļõšļļšłćŚÄľŚĺóÁ≥ĺÁļŹ, u nayay ku balucu' a tademaw ,šłćŚíĆŤ¨õÁźÜÁöĄšļļ, sasahican amasasukaynah,ś≤íŚŅÖŤ¶ĀŚíĆšĽĖŚÄĎÁą≠Śü∑, supeden ku i balucuay a sadep, , kiyu u tatengaay a tabakiay a nabalucuan.śČćśėĮÁúüś≠£ÁöĄŚ§ßśį£. anu sikawaw amana kaalialiyac. . yadahay a kawaw ŚĺąŚ§öšļčśÉÖ, anu matibeng tu kita paculi inayi tu ku laheci, , anu mahini sa pinabaw han tu kubalucu',šłćŚ¶āŤģďŚÖßŚŅÉÁöĄśĻĖťĚĘ, satedepen ku nikasalain.ŚĀúś≠Ęś≥õśľ£śľ™. sakamu sa ci:wang-cen-ciśĪ™śõĺÁ•ļŤ™™: "satedep, u nikaniketan, widasa,u nananaman""ťĚú, . sakamusa ci:cu-ke-liyang: "caay kaw pahelak sananay caay kaw matatudungay, anu caay kasatedep nayi ku laheci tabaat" ." minabaw ku balucu' cay kaw matatudungay. usadep unananaman tu" ." amana kalalid nu hekal palamal han malikat tu, amana katengteng nu cayay katatudung atademaw, anu caay kalewasay , kasadep ku balucu' , yaan naca tepalay a tademaw manamuh tu, widasa namakay nilabunu balucu' a nikaniketan. . katuud kunamicudaday mipalita: pahabay kaku takuwansa, maniket, sadikuday sa taluma' tu, sadikuday balakisatu tanukubid sa tu. . ci yang-lan sakamusa tu cacay , kapah ku nipatukil nida: "idaw ku palitaay, utatayna matenes micuda, yadah kunipicuda, sadikuday sa taluma'iniyadu', , mikuli, siacawaw mibaca, malalungun tu acawaw mukelid tu wawaw, sakangeluansa? ? dateng sa kaku, hatiniay tu numita amuledu usakahica, kanahatu dadikuday madebay ikacalilaw, caytu pakaduduc, malecaday a kawaw, caykalecad ku balucu', śąĎśÉ≥, , Malecaday a lauma' , cay kalecad ku labunuluma' malecaday u mukilulay, cay kalecad ku azi. Nikaudip kanca idaw ku cangbul, nika bihbihen ku ababuh nu dikuc, tatayna, anu icuwacuwa kisu, mitanam tu canan a kawaw, sadikuday sa lawpes sa I mihmihcaan,u kakawaw namusa caay kaw sapibelin tu mihcaan a nikaydaan. Widasa saicelang sa musikul tu wayway nu udip, paledu tu kapah, caypilunguc tu belabelad sananay, sisa leduhan manamuh maudip. . sakapah han malaudip, yumidadingu kisu sa, umaminay nu misu awayway sa, masinga naming i labu nu dadingu ya tusaay a mata. . liwan nu kaudip, maydih kaku lipahak tu kisu, manakatawal tu sayaway a balucu' nu tatayna, yadahen ku lipahak, yadahen ku satumicek.ť§ėÁĒü, .

sakamusa"jańß ,ńßatinitu kumńß ¶a aku , ¶imatu ku mamisańß…ômaj tina katuudaj, naj ¶uwaaj a r~…ĺawad a mdaŇč." ." imańßda, dat…ôŇč sa ¶akaku ,***,******, tat…ôŇča ¶aaj kar~…ĺpańßak ku nikaudip nina nipaajaw , . sakamu sa ¶i ijkuŇč ¶uŇč i " ¶aj katin…ôŇč" a ¶uda nisur~…ĺitan mańßini kidakamu, : "anu mdaŇč masumad ku wajwaj nu tad…ômaw,"*********, pakaadińß tu masumad mi ¶unus paka tanaju Ē~ °, . " ."ina kamu pasubana titaan ,*******, u duma a kawaw amana par~…ĺatikińß naji ku ńßi ¶a,*********, u duma atad…ômaw amana pikakutud,********, u najaj ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a tad…ômaw ,******, sasańßi ¶an amasasukajnańß,********, sup…ôd…ôn ku i bar~…ĺu ¶uaj a sad…ôp, , kiju u tat…ôŇčaaj a tabakiaj a nabar~…ĺu ¶uan.*******. anu sikawaw amana kaar~…ĺiar~…ĺija ¶. . jadańßaj a kawaw ****, anu matib…ôŇč tu kita pa ¶ur~…ĺi inaji tu ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i, , anu mańßini sa pinabaw ńßan tu kubar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °,********, sat…ôd…ôp…ôn ku nikasar~…ĺain.*****. sakamu sa ¶i:waŇč- ¶…ôn- ¶i****: "sat…ôd…ôp, u nikanik…ôtan, widasa,u nananaman""*, . sakamusa ¶i: ¶u-k…ô-r~…ĺijaŇč: " ¶aaj kaw pańß…ôr~…ĺak sananaj ¶aaj kaw matatuduŇčaj, anu ¶aaj kasat…ôd…ôp naji ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tabaat" ." minabaw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ¶aj kaw matatuduŇčaj. usad…ôp unananaman tu" ." amana kar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ par~…ĺamar~…ĺ ńßan mar~…ĺikat tu, amana kat…ôŇčt…ôŇč nu ¶ajaj katatuduŇč atad…ômaw, anu ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ôwasaj , kasad…ôp ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° , jaan na ¶a t…ôpar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw manamuńß tu, widasa namakaj nir~…ĺabunu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a nikanik…ôtan. . katuud kunami ¶udadaj mipar~…ĺita: pańßabaj kaku takuwansa, manik…ôt, sadikudaj sa tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu, sadikudaj bar~…ĺakisatu tanukubid sa tu. . ¶i jaŇč-r~…ĺan sakamusa tu ¶a ¶aj , kapańß ku nipatukir~…ĺ nida: "idaw ku par~…ĺitaaj, utatajna mat…ôn…ôs mi ¶uda, jadańß kunipi ¶uda, sadikudaj sa tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °inijadu Ē~ °, , mikur~…ĺi, sia ¶awaw miba ¶a, mar~…ĺar~…ĺuŇčun tu a ¶awaw muk…ôr~…ĺid tu wawaw, sakaŇč…ôr~…ĺuansa? ? dat…ôŇč sa kaku, ńßatiniaj tu numita amur~…ĺ…ôdu usakańßi ¶a, kanańßatu dadikudaj mad…ôbaj ika ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw, ¶ajtu pakadudu ¶, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a kawaw, ¶ajkar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, **, , mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺauma Ē~ ° , ¶aj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku r~…ĺabunur~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj u mukir~…ĺur~…ĺaj, ¶aj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku azi. nikaudip kan ¶a idaw ku ¶aŇčbur~…ĺ, nika bińßbińß…ôn ku ababuńß nu diku ¶, tatajna, anu i ¶uwa ¶uwa kisu, mitanam tu ¶anan a kawaw, sadikudaj sa r~…ĺawp…ôs sa i mińßmińß ¶aan,u kakawaw namusa ¶aaj kaw sapib…ôr~…ĺin tu mińß ¶aan a nikajdaan. widasa sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa musikur~…ĺ tu wajwaj nu udip, par~…ĺ…ôdu tu kapańß, ¶ajpir~…ĺuŇču ¶ tu b…ôr~…ĺab…ôr~…ĺad sananaj, sisa r~…ĺ…ôduńßan manamuńß maudip. . sakapańß ńßan mar~…ĺaudip, jumidadiŇču kisu sa, umaminaj nu misu awajwaj sa, masiŇča namiŇč i r~…ĺabu nu dadiŇču ja tusaaj a mata. . r~…ĺiwan nu kaudip, majdińß kaku r~…ĺipańßak tu kisu, manakatawar~…ĺ tu sajawaj a bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu tatajna, jadańß…ôn ku r~…ĺipańßak, jadańß…ôn ku satumi ¶…ôk.**, .
